# LinkedIn Draft - 2026-07-05

Custom harness builders may see newer Anthropic models regress on non-Claude-Code tool schemas unless strict validation is enabled.

Went through 40 links today. Here's what made the brief:

1. Better Models: Worse Tools
   Custom harness builders may see newer Anthropic models regress on non-Claude-Code tool schemas unless strict validation is enabled.

2. Introducing @neon/sdk, our new TypeScript client for the Neon API
   Neon replaced its older API client with a fetch-based TypeScript SDK that adds readiness polling and higher-level workflows useful for automation.

3. Bad Epoll (CVE-2026-46242)
   Credible kernel exploit writeup with affected version window and a concrete patch commit.
